name: PCI DSS
description: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard v4.0 (Optional) - for organizations handling cardholder data

requirements.requirement_text: Network security controls (NSCs) are defined and implemented to protect the cardholder data environment (CDE).
requirements.expected_evidence: Network diagram with CDE boundaries, firewall rule documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and document CDE boundaries with firewall rules restricting traffic to only necessary services.

requirements.requirement_text: Network security controls are configured to restrict inbound and outbound traffic to the CDE.
requirements.expected_evidence: Firewall configuration standards, rule review records
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement deny-all default firewall rules with explicit allow rules for required CDE traffic only.

requirements.requirement_text: Configuration standards are developed, implemented, and maintained for all system components.
requirements.expected_evidence: Configuration standards, hardening guides, configuration audit results
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop PCI-compliant configuration standards and verify compliance through regular audits.

requirements.requirement_text: Vendor default accounts and passwords are changed or removed before systems are placed on the network.
requirements.expected_evidence: Default account removal records, password change verification
requirements.recommendation_text: Change or disable all vendor default credentials before deploying systems to production.

requirements.requirement_text: Account data storage is kept to a minimum with defined retention and disposal procedures.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data retention policy, data flow diagram, PAN storage inventory
requirements.recommendation_text: Minimize stored cardholder data, define retention limits, and implement secure disposal procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Sensitive authentication data (SAD) is not stored after authorization.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data storage audit confirming no SAD retention, application configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Ensure CVV, full track data, and PIN blocks are never stored post-authorization.

requirements.requirement_text: PAN is rendered unreadable anywhere it is stored using strong cryptography or truncation.
requirements.expected_evidence: Encryption/tokenization implementation, key management documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Encrypt or tokenize all stored PAN using PCI-approved methods with proper key management.

requirements.requirement_text: Strong cryptography and security protocols are used to safeguard PAN during transmission over open, public networks.
requirements.expected_evidence: TLS configuration, certificate management, network transmission encryption
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce TLS 1.2+ for all PAN transmission with strong cipher suites and valid certificates.

requirements.requirement_text: Anti-malware solutions are deployed on all system components except those specifically confirmed as not at risk.
requirements.expected_evidence: Anti-malware deployment records, scan schedules, detection logs
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy anti-malware on all CDE systems with automatic updates and regular scanning.

requirements.requirement_text: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed through secure development practices and patch management.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vulnerability management policy, patch records, secure SDLC documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish vulnerability identification and patching SLAs for all CDE system components.

requirements.requirement_text: Bespoke and custom software is developed securely following PCI DSS and industry best practices.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secure coding standards, code review records, SAST/DAST results
requirements.recommendation_text: Apply secure coding practices and security testing to all custom payment applications.

requirements.requirement_text: Access to system components and cardholder data is limited to only those individuals whose job requires such access.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access control policy, role-based access matrix, access reviews
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement least-privilege access to CDE with quarterly access reviews.

requirements.category: Requirement 8 - Identify Users and Authenticate Access
requirements.requirement_text: Processes and mechanisms for identifying users and authenticating access to system components are defined and documented.
requirements.expected_evidence: Authentication policy, unique user ID assignment procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Assign unique IDs to all users and define authentication requirements for CDE access.

requirements.requirement_text: Multi-factor authentication is implemented for all access into the CDE.
requirements.expected_evidence: MFA deployment for CDE access, authentication configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Require MFA for all personnel accessing the cardholder data environment.

requirements.requirement_text: Physical access controls limit and monitor physical access to systems in the CDE.
requirements.expected_evidence: Physical access policy, access logs, visitor management procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement physical access controls with logging for all CDE locations.

requirements.requirement_text: Audit logs are enabled and active for all system components and cardholder data.
requirements.expected_evidence: Logging configuration for CDE systems, log retention policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Enable comprehensive audit logging on all CDE components with minimum 12-month retention.

requirements.requirement_text: Audit logs capture all individual access to cardholder data and all actions by privileged users.
requirements.expected_evidence: Log content verification, privileged access monitoring
requirements.recommendation_text: Configure logs to capture all cardholder data access and privileged user actions.

requirements.requirement_text: Wireless access points are identified and tested for unauthorized devices at least quarterly.
requirements.expected_evidence: Wireless scan results, rogue AP detection procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Scan for unauthorized wireless access points quarterly in and around the CDE.

requirements.requirement_text: Internal and external vulnerability scans are performed at least quarterly and after significant changes.
requirements.expected_evidence: Quarterly scan reports, ASV scan results, remediation records
requirements.recommendation_text: Perform quarterly internal and external vulnerability scans with passing ASV scans.

requirements.requirement_text: External and internal penetration testing is performed at least annually and after significant changes.
requirements.expected_evidence: Penetration test reports, remediation tracking
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct annual penetration tests covering CDE with remediation of all critical findings.

requirements.requirement_text: An information security policy is established, published, maintained, and disseminated to all relevant personnel.
requirements.expected_evidence: Information security policy, annual review records, employee acknowledgment
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain a PCI-aligned information security policy reviewed annually and acknowledged by personnel.
